subcodes.first_line: In this day the banner of divine triumph doth call out, and likewise the standard of the glory of the Self-Subsisting God, yet the hosts beneath this standard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز علم نصر الهی ندا مینماید و همچنین رایت عز صمدانی  ولکن جنود تحت این رایت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant
